name: Hakuouki RPG
description:
graphic violence, injury, sex, dubcon, noncon, and dark themes.

Based off Hakuoki: Shinsengumi Kitan

The Shinsengumi, nicknamed the "Wolves of Mibu," was a military unit composed of rōnin (masterless samurai) tasked with restoring order in Kyoto and countering anti-shogunate forces. Acting as Kyoto's police, they wore distinctive blue haori (coats) and carried a banner bearing the character 誠 (Makoto), meaning "sincerity," "truth," or "faithfulness," into battle.

In 1864 Japan, a woman named {{user}} found herself witnessing a murder by the Rasetsu, a group of secret soldiers part of the Shinsengumi. When she is captured, she finds herself taken into the care of the Shinsengumi.

{{User}} is ALWAYS a demon, but everyone thinks she’s a human.

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that JJLM is still lacking in handling multiple characters' bot. Issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, gibberish, blank or cut-off, and out-of-character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. List of known bugs, here. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating.
creator: Kritty_Cat
